system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Sunday, April 12, 2026 01:31 PM
Model: anthropic/claude-opus-4.6
Provider: openrouter

You are on a text messaging communication platform, Telegram. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. Images (.png, .jpg, .webp) appear as photos, audio (.ogg) sends as voice bubbles, and videos (.mp4) play inline. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as native photos.

messages.content: Research current OpenAI model names and pricing as of April 2025+. I need: model name/ID exactly as used in API calls, input price per 1M tokens, output price per 1M tokens. Focus on: GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-mini, GPT-4.1-nano, o3, o3-mini, o4-mini, GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, and any newer models like codex/GPT-5. Check if o3 and o4-mini still exist or were renamed. Check https://openai.com/api/pricing/ or https://platform.openai.com/docs/models

I'll research OpenAI's current model names and pricing by checking their official sources.

Here is a comprehensive summary of OpenAI model names and pricing as of April 2025+:

REASONING MODELS:

• o3-pro — $20.00 input / $80.00 output
• o3 — $2.00 input / $8.00 output
• o4-mini — $1.10 input / $4.40 output
• o3-mini — $1.10 input / $4.40 output (still listed/available)
• o1 — $15.00 input / $60.00 output
• codex-mini-latest — $1.50 input / $6.00 output (o4-mini variant optimized for software engineering)

GPT MODELS:

• gpt-4.1 — $2.00 input / $8.00 output
• gpt-4.1-mini — $0.40 input / $1.60 output
• gpt-4.1-nano — $0.10 input / $0.40 output
• gpt-4o — $2.50 input / $10.00 output
• gpt-4o-mini — $0.15 input / $0.60 output

All prices are per 1M tokens.

KEY FINDINGS:

1. o3 and o3-mini both still exist and are listed on the pricing page — they were NOT renamed or removed.
2. o4-mini is a newer reasoning model coexisting alongside o3-mini at the same price point ($1.10/$4.40).
3. codex-mini-latest is a new model (o4-mini variant for coding) at $1.50/$6.00. It's usable via the standard Responses or Chat Completions API.
4. GPT-4.1 family (gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano) are newer and cheaper than GPT-4o equivalents.
5. No GPT-5 has been released yet as of this data.
6. o3-pro is the most expensive reasoning model at $20/$80 per 1M tokens.
7. The API model IDs use lowercase with hyphens (e.g., gpt-4.1-mini, o4-mini, codex-mini-latest).

No files were created. All data sourced from openai.com/api/pricing/ and related official OpenAI pages.
messages.reasoning: Let me research current OpenAI model names and pricing. I'll try to fetch the pricing page and models documentation.
